message:
✨ Add drag-and-drop workload deployment to clusters

Implement drag-and-drop functionality allowing users to deploy workloads
to clusters by dragging from the WorkloadDeployment card to a ClusterDropZone.

Changes:
- Create ClusterDropZone component with droppable clusters
- Add useDraggable to WorkloadDeployment items with grip handle
- Extend DashboardRuntime to detect workload drags and show drop zone
- Show cluster capacity (nodes, CPU, memory, GPU) in drop targets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
